# OpenClaw Event Server Plugin v1.0.1

This release switches npm distribution to the unscoped package name:

- `openclaw-event-server-plugin`

## Summary

- npm publish target updated from scoped package name to unscoped package name.
- README install command updated to match unscoped package install.
- Package lock metadata updated accordingly.

## Why this release

The previous scoped publish flow required scope membership/permissions that were not available for this account. This release unblocks automated publishing and installation.

## Install

```bash
openclaw plugins install openclaw-event-server-plugin
```
